message:
fix: consolidate duplicate useMCP import in Deploy.tsx (#3598) (#3749)

The duplicate import statements (useClusters and useDeployments imported
separately from the same module) could cause Safari WebKit runtime errors.
The card.position optional chaining fixes from PR #3599 were already
applied to main in a prior merge, so this commit addresses the remaining
duplicate import issue.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,8 +1,7 @@
 import { useState, useCallback, useMemo } from 'react'
 import type { DragEndEvent } from '@dnd-kit/core'
 import { useClusterGroups } from '../../hooks/useClusterGroups'
-import { useClusters } from '../../hooks/useMCP'
-import { useDeployments } from '../../hooks/useMCP'
+import { useClusters, useDeployments } from '../../hooks/useMCP'
 import { useCachedDeployments } from '../../hooks/useCachedData'
 import { useUniversalStats, createMergedStatValueGetter } from '../../hooks/useUniversalStats'
 import { StatBlockValue } from '../ui/StatsOverview'
